endpoints.name: GET /data
endpoints.description: Returns Analytics report data for a view (profile).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /management/accounts
endpoints.description: Lists all accounts to which the user has access.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /management/accounts/{accountId}/webproperties
endpoints.description: Lists web properties to which the user has access.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /management/accounts/{accountId}/webproperties/{webPropertyId}/profiles
endpoints.description: Lists views (profiles) to which the user has access.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WEBPROPERTYID}} with a real webpropertyid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /management/accounts/{accountId}/webproperties/{webPropertyId}/profiles/{profileId}/goals
endpoints.description: Lists goals to which the user has access.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROFILEID}} with a real profileid. Replace {{WEBPROPERTYID}} with a real webpropertyid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /management/segments
endpoints.description: Lists advanced segments to which the user has access.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.
